name: 05-12-memory-atoms-prompt-injection-fix
title: fix: memory atoms not injected into LLM prompt
description: Memory atoms are created and persisted by auto_create_memories_from_chat(), but never loaded back into the LLM prompt. PromptBuildConfig has a memory_atoms field that is always empty when build() is called from _chat_response_text(). Fix: load memory atoms from store and pass to PromptBuildConfig before building the prompt.
creator: claude
notes: 已完成：v1 runtime 在 LLM prompt 构建前按 memory_policy 加载可见 MemoryAtom，过滤私密/owner-only 记忆后传入 PromptBuildConfig.memory_atoms；已补回归测试。
